```md
# Space Invaders Implementation Plan

## Context

The project already has a working Breakout game on the SAME51 IGAT board (480x320 touch display, LVGL 8.2.0). The user wants to add Space Invaders as a second game, with a game selection menu replacing the current single-tap splash screen.

## New Files

\```
src/game/space_invaders.h   — Public: space_invaders_create(), space_invaders_destroy()
src/game/space_invaders.c   — Full game implementation (~320 lines)
\```

## Modified Files

### src/game/splash_screen.c
- Replace the single "Tap to Start" flow with two clickable buttons: "Breakout" and "Space Invaders"
- Each button's click callback launches the corresponding game
- Update title to "ARCADE GAMES" or similar generic title
- Add `#include "space_invaders.h"`

### igat.X/nbproject/configurations.xml
- Add `../src/game/space_invaders.h` to the game logical folder (after breakout.h, line ~251)
- Add `../src/game/space_invaders.c` to source files (after breakout.c, line ~756)

## Space Invaders Design

### Layout (480x320)
- Alien grid: 8 cols × 4 rows = 32 aliens, each 28x20 px, 6px gaps
- Grid centered horizontally, starts at y=35
- Player ship: 40x20 px at y=285, follows touch X
- Bullets: 4x10 px — 1 player bullet (up), 3 alien bullets (down) max
- Score top-left, Lives top-right, message center

### Object Count & Memory
- 42 LVGL objects total (32 aliens + ship + 4 bullets + 3 labels + screen + 1 pad)
- ~12KB heap — same as Breakout, within 48KB budget
- Static state struct in BSS (~210 bytes, no heap cost)

### Constants (defined in space_invaders.c, prefixed SI_)
- Grid: 8 cols, 4 rows, 28x20px aliens, 6px gaps, margin_left=34, margin_top=35
- Ship: 40x20 at Y=285
- Bullets: 4x10, player speed=6px/tick up, alien speed=4px/tick down
- Movement: step X=4px, drop Y=12px, base interval=30 ticks, min=4 ticks
- Firing: base interval=40 ticks, min=15 ticks, max 3 active alien bullets
- Scoring: 40/30/20/10 pts by row (top to bottom)
- 3 lives, invasion Y = ship Y - alien height triggers game over

### Game Architecture
- Static `space_invaders_state_t` struct (mirrors breakout_state_t pattern)
- 20ms game timer via `lv_timer_create()`
- Step-based alien movement: grid moves as a unit, steps every N ticks, N decreases as aliens die
- Edge detection uses leftmost/rightmost living column, reverses direction + drops
- Player fires on tap (1 bullet at a time), aliens fire periodically from bottom-most living alien in a random column
- xorshift16 PRNG for alien column selection (no stdlib dependency)
- AABB collision: player bullet vs aliens, alien bullets vs ship
- All objects pre-allocated, hidden/shown via LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN

### State Flow
- IDLE: "Tap to start" message, ship visible — tap starts game
- PLAYING: ship follows touch X, tap fires bullet, aliens march + shoot
- GAME_OVER: aliens reach ship level OR lives=0 — tap returns to splash
- WIN: all 32 aliens destroyed — tap returns to splash

### Alien Row Colors (runtime init like breakout)
- Row 0: Red-pink (0xFF, 0x00, 0x40) — 40 pts
- Row 1: Orange (0xFF, 0x80, 0x00) — 30 pts
- Row 2: Green (0x00, 0xFF, 0x80) — 20 pts
- Row 3: Blue (0x00, 0x80, 0xFF) — 10 pts

### Key Functions
| Function | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `space_invaders_create()` | Create screen, all objects, timer, load screen |
| `space_invaders_destroy()` | Delete timer and screen |
| `si_game_timer_cb()` | Main loop: move ship/bullets, step aliens, fire, collisions |
| `si_screen_click_cb()` | Fire bullet (PLAYING), start (IDLE), return to splash (OVER/WIN) |
| `si_move_aliens()` | Step grid, reverse+drop at edges, check invasion |
| `si_alien_fire()` | Pick random bottom-row alien in a column, spawn bullet |
| `si_check_player_bullet_hits()` | Player bullet vs aliens AABB |
| `si_check_alien_bullet_hits()` | Alien bullets vs ship AABB |

## Splash Screen Modifications

Replace current implementation with:
- Title: "ARCADE" (Montserrat 16, centered y=-60)
- Two styled buttons with labels:
  - "Breakout" button (left-center area, y=0)
  - "Space Invaders" button (right-center area, y=0)
- Each button has its own click callback that creates the respective game and deletes the splash
- Remove the full-screen click handler (buttons handle it instead)

\```

**Source section** (after line 756):

\```

2. Flash to SAME51 IGAT board
3. Boot shows splash with two game buttons
4. Tap "Breakout" → Breakout works as before
5. Tap "Space Invaders" → aliens march side to side, drop at edges
6. Touch moves ship, tap fires bullets upward
7. Aliens shoot back, bullets hit player decrements lives
8. All aliens killed → "YOU WIN!", tap → splash
9. Lives=0 or aliens reach bottom → "GAME OVER", tap → splash
10. Aliens speed up as fewer remain

1	# Breakout Game Implementation Plan
2	
3	## Context
4	
5	This project is an LVGL demo running on a Microchip SAME51 (Cortex-M4F, 120MHz) with a 480x320 ILI9488 touch display. Currently it shows `lv_demo_widgets()`. We're replacing all existing screens with a splash screen + Breakout game controlled via touchscreen. LVGL version is 8.2.0, RGB565, 48KB LVGL heap, ~30fps refresh.
6	
7	## File Structure
8	
9	```
10	src/game/
11	  game_common.h      — Shared constants (display dims, layout, speeds)
12	  splash_screen.h    — Public: splash_screen_create()
13	  splash_screen.c    — Splash UI with "BREAKOUT" title + "Tap to Start"
14	  breakout.h         — Public: breakout_create(), breakout_destroy()
15	  breakout.c         — Game logic, rendering, collision, game loop timer
16	```
17	
18	## Changes to Existing Files
19	
20	### src/app.c
21	- Make `touchX`, `touchY`, `touchDown` non-static (expose for game code)
22	- Replace the `#if LV_USE_DEMO_WIDGETS ... #endif` block (lines 211-219) with `splash_screen_create()`
23	- Add `#include "game/splash_screen.h"`
24	- Remove `#include "../../../third_party/lvgl/demos/lv_demos.h"`
25	
26	### src/app.h
27	- Add `extern` declarations for `touchX`, `touchY`, `touchDown`
28	
29	### igat.X/nbproject/configurations.xml
30	- Add `../src/game/splash_screen.c`, `../src/game/breakout.c` to source files section
31	- Add `../src/game/game_common.h`, `../src/game/splash_screen.h`, `../src/game/breakout.h` to header files section
32	
33	## Game Architecture
34	
35	### Splash Screen (splash_screen.c)
36	- Creates a new screen with `lv_obj_create(NULL)`
37	- Adds centered "BREAKOUT" title (Montserrat 16, bold if available)
38	- Adds "Tap to Start" instruction label below
39	- Registers `LV_EVENT_CLICKED` on screen → calls `breakout_create()`
40	- Dark background (dark blue/black)
41	
42	### Breakout Game (breakout.c)
43	
44	**Static state struct** (no malloc):
45	- `lv_obj_t*` pointers for: screen, paddle, ball, 50 bricks, score/lives/message labels
46	- Ball position + velocity (integer with x16 fixed-point for sub-pixel)
47	- Game state enum: IDLE → PLAYING → GAME_OVER / WIN
48	- Lives (3), score, bricks_remaining count
49	
50	**Layout (480x320 display):**
51	- Bricks: 10 cols × 5 rows, each 40×14 px, 4px gaps, centered horizontally, starting at y=30
52	- Paddle: 80×12 px at y=290, follows touch X directly
53	- Ball: 10×10 px circle (radius=5)
54	- Score label: top-left corner
55	- Lives label: top-right corner
56	
57	**Game loop** (`lv_timer_create` at 20ms / 50Hz):
58	1. Update paddle X from `touchX` global
59	2. Move ball with fixed-point accumulation
60	3. Check collisions: walls → paddle → bricks
61	4. Update LVGL object positions (`lv_obj_set_pos` for ball + paddle only)
62	5. Check win/lose conditions
63	
64	**Collision:**
65	- Walls: reflect on boundary contact
66	- Paddle: reflect Y, adjust ball vx based on hit offset from paddle center (angle control)
67	- Bricks: AABB test, hide brick with `LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN`, reflect based on penetration axis
68	- Ball lost below screen: decrement lives, reset ball to paddle (IDLE state)
69	
70	**Screen flow:**
71	- Tap in IDLE → launch ball upward-right
72	- All bricks gone → show "YOU WIN!", tap → back to splash
73	- Lives = 0 → show "GAME OVER", tap → back to splash
74	
75	### Performance Strategy
76	- All 50 brick objects pre-allocated at start, hidden/shown (never created/deleted mid-game)
77	- Only ball + paddle positions change per frame (2 × `lv_obj_set_pos` calls)
78	- All objects have `LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE` and `LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE` cleared
79	- Integer-only physics (no FPU use in game loop)
80	- Score uses `lv_label_set_text_fmt()` to avoid buffer allocation
81	- Estimated LVGL heap usage: ~12KB of 48KB available
82	
83	## Verification

90	6. Bricks disappear on hit, score increments
91	7. Ball falling below paddle decrements lives
92	8. Lives=0 shows game over, tap returns to splash
93	9. All bricks cleared shows win message

# Space Invaders Implementation Plan

## Context

The project already has a working Breakout game on the SAME51 IGAT board (480x320 touch display, LVGL 8.2.0). The user wants to add Space Invaders as a second game, with a game selection menu (two buttons) replacing the current single-tap splash screen.

## New Files

\```
src/game/space_invaders.h   — Public: space_invaders_create(), space_invaders_destroy()
src/game/space_invaders.c   — Full game implementation (~320 lines)
\```

## Modified Files

### src/game/splash_screen.c
- Replace the single "Tap to Start" flow with two clickable buttons: "Breakout" and "Space Invaders"
- Each button's click callback launches the corresponding game
- Update title to "ARCADE" or similar generic title
- Add `#include "space_invaders.h"`

### igat.X/nbproject/configurations.xml
- Add `../src/game/space_invaders.h` to the game logical folder (after breakout.h, line ~251)
- Add `../src/game/space_invaders.c` to source files (after breakout.c, line ~756)

## Space Invaders Design

### Layout (480x320)
- Alien grid: 8 cols x 4 rows = 32 aliens, each 28x20 px, 6px gaps
- Grid centered horizontally (margin_left=34), starts at y=35
- Player ship: 40x20 px at y=285, follows touch X
- Bullets: 4x10 px — 1 player bullet (up), 3 alien bullets (down) max
- Score top-left, Lives top-right, message center

### Object Count & Memory
- 42 LVGL objects total (32 aliens + ship + 4 bullets + 3 labels + screen)
- ~12KB heap — same as Breakout, within 48KB budget
- Static state struct in BSS (~210 bytes, no heap cost)

### Constants (defined in space_invaders.c, prefixed SI_)
- Grid: 8 cols, 4 rows, 28x20px aliens, 6px gaps
- Ship: 40x20 at Y=285
- Bullets: 4x10, player speed=6px/tick up, alien speed=4px/tick down
- Movement: step X=4px, drop Y=12px, base interval=30 ticks, min=4 ticks
- Firing: base interval=40 ticks, min=15 ticks, max 3 active alien bullets
- Scoring: 40/30/20/10 pts by row (top to bottom)
- 3 lives, invasion at ship Y triggers game over

### Game Architecture
- Static `space_invaders_state_t` struct (mirrors breakout pattern)
- 20ms game timer via `lv_timer_create()`
- Step-based alien movement: grid moves as a unit, steps every N ticks, N decreases as aliens die
- Edge detection uses leftmost/rightmost living column, reverses direction + drops
- Player fires on tap (1 bullet at a time), aliens fire periodically from bottom-most living alien in random column
- xorshift16 PRNG for alien column selection (no stdlib dependency)
- AABB collision: player bullet vs aliens, alien bullets vs ship
- All objects pre-allocated, hidden/shown via LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN

### State Flow
- IDLE: "Tap to start" message — tap starts game
- PLAYING: ship follows touch X, tap fires bullet, aliens march + shoot
- GAME_OVER: aliens reach ship level OR lives=0 — tap returns to splash
- WIN: all 32 aliens destroyed — tap returns to splash

### Alien Row Colors (runtime init)
- Row 0: Red-pink — 40 pts
- Row 1: Orange — 30 pts
- Row 2: Green — 20 pts
- Row 3: Blue — 10 pts

### Key Functions
| Function | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `space_invaders_create()` | Create screen, all objects, timer, load screen |
| `space_invaders_destroy()` | Delete timer and screen |
| `si_game_timer_cb()` | Main loop: move ship/bullets, step aliens, fire, collisions |
| `si_screen_click_cb()` | Fire bullet (PLAYING), start (IDLE), return to splash (OVER/WIN) |
| `si_move_aliens()` | Step grid, reverse+drop at edges, check invasion |
| `si_alien_fire()` | Pick random bottom-row alien in a column, spawn bullet |
| `si_check_player_bullet_hits()` | Player bullet vs aliens AABB |
| `si_check_alien_bullet_hits()` | Alien bullets vs ship AABB |

## Splash Screen Modifications

Replace current implementation with:
- Title: "ARCADE" (Montserrat 16, white, centered y=-60)
- Two styled button objects with labels:
  - "Breakout" button (centered, y=-10)
  - "Space Invaders" button (centered, y=40)
- Each button has its own click callback that creates the respective game and deletes splash
- Dark blue background preserved

**Source section** (after breakout.c):

5. Tap "Space Invaders" → aliens march side to side, drop at edges

7. Aliens shoot back, hits decrement lives
8. All aliens killed → "YOU WIN!", tap → splash
9. Lives=0 or invasion → "GAME OVER", tap → splash
10. Aliens speed up as fewer remain

```c
#include "space_invaders.h"
#include "splash_screen.h"
#include "game_common.h"
#include "../app.h"
#include "../../../../third_party/lvgl/src/lvgl.h"

#define SI_ALIEN_COLS           8
#define SI_ALIEN_ROWS           4
#define SI_ALIEN_COUNT          (SI_ALIEN_COLS * SI_ALIEN_ROWS)

#define SI_ALIEN_WIDTH          28
#define SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT         20
#define SI_ALIEN_GAP_H          6
#define SI_ALIEN_GAP_V          6
#define SI_ALIEN_MARGIN_TOP     35
#define SI_ALIEN_MARGIN_LEFT    34

#define SI_SHIP_WIDTH           40
#define SI_SHIP_HEIGHT          20
#define SI_SHIP_Y               285

#define SI_BULLET_WIDTH         4
#define SI_BULLET_HEIGHT        10
#define SI_PLAYER_BULLET_SPEED  6
#define SI_ALIEN_BULLET_SPEED   4
#define SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS    3

#define SI_ALIEN_STEP_X         4
#define SI_ALIEN_DROP_Y         12
#define SI_BASE_MOVE_TICKS      30
#define SI_MIN_MOVE_TICKS       4

#define SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_TICKS  40
#define SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_MIN    15

#define SI_INVASION_Y           (SI_SHIP_Y - SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT)

static const uint16_t si_row_scores[SI_ALIEN_ROWS] = { 40, 30, 20, 10 };

static lv_color_t si_alien_colors[SI_ALIEN_ROWS];

static void si_init_colors(void)
{
    si_alien_colors[0] = lv_color_make(0xFF, 0x00, 0x40);
    si_alien_colors[1] = lv_color_make(0xFF, 0x80, 0x00);
    si_alien_colors[2] = lv_color_make(0x00, 0xFF, 0x80);
    si_alien_colors[3] = lv_color_make(0x00, 0x80, 0xFF);
}

typedef struct {
    lv_obj_t *screen;
    lv_obj_t *aliens[SI_ALIEN_COUNT];
    lv_obj_t *ship;
    lv_obj_t *player_bullet;
    lv_obj_t *alien_bullets[SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS];
    lv_obj_t *score_label;
    lv_obj_t *lives_label;
    lv_obj_t *message_label;

    lv_timer_t *game_timer;

    game_state_t state;
    uint16_t score;
    uint8_t lives;
    uint8_t aliens_alive;

    bool alien_alive[SI_ALIEN_COUNT];
    int16_t grid_x;
    int16_t grid_y;
    int8_t grid_dir;
    uint16_t move_tick_counter;
    uint16_t move_interval;

    int16_t ship_x;

    int16_t pbullet_x;
    int16_t pbullet_y;
    bool pbullet_active;

    int16_t abullet_x[SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS];
    int16_t abullet_y[SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS];
    bool abullet_active[SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS];

    uint16_t fire_tick_counter;
    uint16_t fire_interval;

    uint16_t rng_state;
} space_invaders_state_t;

static space_invaders_state_t g_si;

static uint16_t si_rand(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    g->rng_state ^= g->rng_state << 7;
    g->rng_state ^= g->rng_state >> 9;
    g->rng_state ^= g->rng_state << 8;
    return g->rng_state;
}

static void si_update_score_display(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    lv_label_set_text_fmt(g->score_label, "Score: %d", g->score);
}

static void si_update_lives_display(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    lv_label_set_text_fmt(g->lives_label, "Lives: %d", g->lives);
}

static void si_show_message(space_invaders_state_t *g, const char *msg)
{
    lv_label_set_text(g->message_label, msg);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(g->message_label, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
}

static void si_hide_message(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    lv_obj_add_flag(g->message_label, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
}

static void si_recalc_speed(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    int16_t killed = SI_ALIEN_COUNT - g->aliens_alive;
    g->move_interval = SI_BASE_MOVE_TICKS - killed;
    if (g->move_interval < SI_MIN_MOVE_TICKS) g->move_interval = SI_MIN_MOVE_TICKS;

    g->fire_interval = SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_TICKS - killed / 2;
    if (g->fire_interval < SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_MIN) g->fire_interval = SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_MIN;
}

static void si_find_grid_bounds(space_invaders_state_t *g, int16_t *left_col, int16_t *right_col)
{
    *left_col = SI_ALIEN_COLS;
    *right_col = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < SI_ALIEN_COUNT; i++) {
        if (!g->alien_alive[i]) continue;
        int col = i % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
        if (col < *left_col) *left_col = col;
        if (col > *right_col) *right_col = col;
    }
}

static void si_update_ship(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    if (touchDown) {
        int16_t target_x = (int16_t)touchX - SI_SHIP_WIDTH / 2;
        if (target_x < 0) target_x = 0;
        if (target_x > SCREEN_WIDTH - SI_SHIP_WIDTH) target_x = SCREEN_WIDTH - SI_SHIP_WIDTH;
        g->ship_x = target_x;
    }
}

static void si_update_player_bullet(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    if (!g->pbullet_active) return;
    g->pbullet_y -= SI_PLAYER_BULLET_SPEED;
    if (g->pbullet_y + SI_BULLET_HEIGHT < 0) {
        g->pbullet_active = false;
        lv_obj_add_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
    }
}

static void si_update_alien_bullets(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
        if (!g->abullet_active[i]) continue;
        g->abullet_y[i] += SI_ALIEN_BULLET_SPEED;
        if (g->abullet_y[i] > SCREEN_HEIGHT) {
            g->abullet_active[i] = false;
            lv_obj_add_flag(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
        }
    }
}

static void si_move_aliens(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    int16_t left_col, right_col;
    si_find_grid_bounds(g, &left_col, &right_col);

    if (right_col < 0) return;

    int16_t left_edge = g->grid_x + left_col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H);
    int16_t right_edge = g->grid_x + right_col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H) + SI_ALIEN_WIDTH;

    bool hit_edge = false;
    if (g->grid_dir > 0 && right_edge + SI_ALIEN_STEP_X > SCREEN_WIDTH) {
        hit_edge = true;
    } else if (g->grid_dir < 0 && left_edge - SI_ALIEN_STEP_X < 0) {
        hit_edge = true;
    }

    if (hit_edge) {
        g->grid_dir = -g->grid_dir;
        g->grid_y += SI_ALIEN_DROP_Y;
    } else {
        g->grid_x += g->grid_dir * SI_ALIEN_STEP_X;
    }
}

static void si_alien_fire(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    int slot = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
        if (!g->abullet_active[i]) { slot = i; break; }
    }
    if (slot < 0) return;

    int attempts = 0;
    while (attempts < SI_ALIEN_COLS * 2) {
        int col = si_rand(g) % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
        int bottom_alien = -1;
        for (int row = SI_ALIEN_ROWS - 1; row >= 0; row--) {
            int idx = row * SI_ALIEN_COLS + col;
            if (g->alien_alive[idx]) { bottom_alien = idx; break; }
        }
        if (bottom_alien >= 0) {
            int ac = bottom_alien % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
            int ar = bottom_alien / SI_ALIEN_COLS;
            g->abullet_x[slot] = g->grid_x + ac * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H) + SI_ALIEN_WIDTH / 2 - SI_BULLET_WIDTH / 2;
            g->abullet_y[slot] = g->grid_y + ar * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V) + SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT;
            g->abullet_active[slot] = true;
            lv_obj_clear_flag(g->alien_bullets[slot], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
            return;
        }
        attempts++;
    }
}

static void si_check_player_bullet_hits(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    if (!g->pbullet_active) return;

    int16_t bx1 = g->pbullet_x;
    int16_t by1 = g->pbullet_y;
    int16_t bx2 = bx1 + SI_BULLET_WIDTH;
    int16_t by2 = by1 + SI_BULLET_HEIGHT;

    for (int i = 0; i < SI_ALIEN_COUNT; i++) {
        if (!g->alien_alive[i]) continue;

        int col = i % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
        int row = i / SI_ALIEN_COLS;
        int16_t ax = g->grid_x + col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H);
        int16_t ay = g->grid_y + row * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V);

        if (bx2 >= ax && bx1 <= ax + SI_ALIEN_WIDTH &&
            by2 >= ay && by1 <= ay + SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT) {
            g->alien_alive[i] = false;
            lv_obj_add_flag(g->aliens[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
            g->aliens_alive--;
            g->score += si_row_scores[row];
            si_update_score_display(g);
            si_recalc_speed(g);

            g->pbullet_active = false;
            lv_obj_add_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);

            if (g->aliens_alive == 0) {
                g->state = GAME_STATE_WIN;
                si_show_message(g, "YOU WIN!\nTap to continue");
            }
            return;
        }
    }
}

static void si_check_alien_bullet_hits(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    int16_t sx1 = g->ship_x;
    int16_t sy1 = SI_SHIP_Y;
    int16_t sx2 = sx1 + SI_SHIP_WIDTH;
    int16_t sy2 = sy1 + SI_SHIP_HEIGHT;

    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
        if (!g->abullet_active[i]) continue;

        int16_t bx1 = g->abullet_x[i];
        int16_t by1 = g->abullet_y[i];
        int16_t bx2 = bx1 + SI_BULLET_WIDTH;
        int16_t by2 = by1 + SI_BULLET_HEIGHT;

        if (bx2 >= sx1 && bx1 <= sx2 && by2 >= sy1 && by1 <= sy2) {
            g->abullet_active[i] = false;
            lv_obj_add_flag(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
            g->lives--;
            si_update_lives_display(g);
            if (g->lives == 0) {
                g->state = GAME_STATE_GAME_OVER;
                si_show_message(g, "GAME OVER\nTap to continue");
            }
            return;
        }
    }
}

static void si_check_invasion(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    for (int i = 0; i < SI_ALIEN_COUNT; i++) {
        if (!g->alien_alive[i]) continue;
        int row = i / SI_ALIEN_COLS;
        int16_t ay = g->grid_y + row * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V) + SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT;
        if (ay >= SI_INVASION_Y) {
            g->state = GAME_STATE_GAME_OVER;
            si_show_message(g, "INVADED!\nTap to continue");
            return;
        }
    }
}

static void si_update_positions(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    lv_obj_set_pos(g->ship, g->ship_x, SI_SHIP_Y);

    if (g->pbullet_active) {
        lv_obj_set_pos(g->player_bullet, g->pbullet_x, g->pbullet_y);
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
        if (g->abullet_active[i]) {
            lv_obj_set_pos(g->alien_bullets[i], g->abullet_x[i], g->abullet_y[i]);
        }
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < SI_ALIEN_COUNT; i++) {
        if (!g->alien_alive[i]) continue;
        int col = i % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
        int row = i / SI_ALIEN_COLS;
        int16_t ax = g->grid_x + col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H);
        int16_t ay = g->grid_y + row * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V);
        lv_obj_set_pos(g->aliens[i], ax, ay);
    }
}

static void si_game_timer_cb(lv_timer_t *timer)
{
    space_invaders_state_t *g = &g_si;
    (void)timer;

    if (g->state != GAME_STATE_PLAYING) return;

    si_update_ship(g);
    si_update_player_bullet(g);
    si_update_alien_bullets(g);

    g->move_tick_counter++;
    if (g->move_tick_counter >= g->move_interval) {
        g->move_tick_counter = 0;
        si_move_aliens(g);
    }

    g->fire_tick_counter++;
    if (g->fire_tick_counter >= g->fire_interval) {
        g->fire_tick_counter = 0;
        si_alien_fire(g);
    }

    si_check_player_bullet_hits(g);
    if (g->state != GAME_STATE_PLAYING) return;
    si_check_alien_bullet_hits(g);
    if (g->state != GAME_STATE_PLAYING) return;
    si_check_invasion(g);

    si_update_positions(g);
}

static void si_screen_click_cb(lv_event_t *e)
{
    space_invaders_state_t *g = &g_si;
    (void)e;

    switch (g->state) {
        case GAME_STATE_IDLE:
            g->state = GAME_STATE_PLAYING;
            si_hide_message(g);
            break;
        case GAME_STATE_PLAYING:
            if (!g->pbullet_active) {
                g->pbullet_x = g->ship_x + SI_SHIP_WIDTH / 2 - SI_BULLET_WIDTH / 2;
                g->pbullet_y = SI_SHIP_Y - SI_BULLET_HEIGHT;
                g->pbullet_active = true;
                lv_obj_clear_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
            }
            break;
        case GAME_STATE_GAME_OVER:
        case GAME_STATE_WIN:
            space_invaders_destroy();
            splash_screen_create();
            break;
    }
}

static void si_create_aliens(space_invaders_state_t *g)
{
    for (int row = 0; row < SI_ALIEN_ROWS; row++) {
        for (int col = 0; col < SI_ALIEN_COLS; col++) {
            int idx = row * SI_ALIEN_COLS + col;
            int16_t x = g->grid_x + col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H);
            int16_t y = g->grid_y + row * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V);

            g->aliens[idx] = lv_obj_create(g->screen);
            lv_obj_set_size(g->aliens[idx], SI_ALIEN_WIDTH, SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT);
            lv_obj_set_pos(g->aliens[idx], x, y);
            lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->aliens[idx], si_alien_colors[row], LV_PART_MAIN);
            lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->aliens[idx], LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
            lv_obj_set_style_radius(g->aliens[idx], 3, LV_PART_MAIN);
            lv_obj_set_style_border_width(g->aliens[idx], 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
            lv_obj_clear_flag(g->aliens[idx], LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);

            g->alien_alive[idx] = true;
        }
    }
    g->aliens_alive = SI_ALIEN_COUNT;
}

void space_invaders_create(void)
{
    space_invaders_state_t *g = &g_si;

    si_init_colors();

    g->screen = lv_obj_create(NULL);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->screen, lv_color_make(0x00, 0x08, 0x18), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->screen, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(g->screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    lv_obj_add_flag(g->screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(g->screen, si_screen_click_cb, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);

    g->grid_x = SI_ALIEN_MARGIN_LEFT;
    g->grid_y = SI_ALIEN_MARGIN_TOP;
    g->grid_dir = 1;
    g->move_tick_counter = 0;
    g->move_interval = SI_BASE_MOVE_TICKS;
    g->fire_tick_counter = 0;
    g->fire_interval = SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_TICKS;
    g->rng_state = 0xACE1;

    si_create_aliens(g);

    /* Ship */
    g->ship_x = (SCREEN_WIDTH - SI_SHIP_WIDTH) / 2;
    g->ship = lv_obj_create(g->screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(g->ship, SI_SHIP_WIDTH, SI_SHIP_HEIGHT);
    lv_obj_set_pos(g->ship, g->ship_x, SI_SHIP_Y);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->ship, lv_color_white(), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->ship, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(g->ship, 4, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(g->ship, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(g->ship, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);

    /* Player bullet */
    g->player_bullet = lv_obj_create(g->screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(g->player_bullet, SI_BULLET_WIDTH, SI_BULLET_HEIGHT);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->player_bullet, lv_color_make(0xC0, 0xFF, 0x00), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->player_bullet, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(g->player_bullet, 1, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(g->player_bullet, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
    lv_obj_add_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
    g->pbullet_active = false;

    /* Alien bullets */
    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
        g->alien_bullets[i] = lv_obj_create(g->screen);
        lv_obj_set_size(g->alien_bullets[i], SI_BULLET_WIDTH, SI_BULLET_HEIGHT);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->alien_bullets[i], lv_color_make(0xFF, 0x40, 0x40), LV_PART_MAIN);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
        lv_obj_set_style_radius(g->alien_bullets[i], 1, LV_PART_MAIN);
        lv_obj_set_style_border_width(g->alien_bullets[i], 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
        lv_obj_clear_flag(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
        lv_obj_add_flag(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
        g->abullet_active[i] = false;
    }

    /* Score label */
    g->score_label = lv_label_create(g->screen);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(g->score_label, lv_color_white(), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(g->score_label, &lv_font_montserrat_12, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_pos(g->score_label, 5, 5);
    g->score = 0;
    si_update_score_display(g);

    /* Lives label */
    g->lives_label = lv_label_create(g->screen);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(g->lives_label, lv_color_white(), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(g->lives_label, &lv_font_montserrat_12, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_align(g->lives_label, LV_ALIGN_TOP_RIGHT, -5, 5);
    g->lives = MAX_LIVES;
    si_update_lives_display(g);

    /* Message label */
    g->message_label = lv_label_create(g->screen);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(g->message_label, lv_color_make(0xFF, 0xFF, 0x00), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(g->message_label, &lv_font_montserrat_16, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_align(g->message_label, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_align(g->message_label, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 40);

    /* Initial state */
    g->state = GAME_STATE_IDLE;
    si_show_message(g, "Tap to start");

    /* Game loop timer */
    g->game_timer = lv_timer_create(si_game_timer_cb, GAME_TIMER_MS, NULL);

    lv_scr_load(g->screen);
}

void space_invaders_destroy(void)
{
    space_invaders_state_t *g = &g_si;

    if (g->game_timer) {
        lv_timer_del(g->game_timer);
        g->game_timer = NULL;
    }

    if (g->screen) {
        lv_obj_del(g->screen);
        g->screen = NULL;
    }
}

static lv_obj_t *splash_scr;

static void breakout_btn_cb(lv_event_t *e)
{
    (void)e;
    lv_obj_t *old_scr = splash_scr;
    splash_scr = NULL;
    breakout_create();
    lv_obj_del(old_scr);
}

static void invaders_btn_cb(lv_event_t *e)
{

    lv_obj_t *old_scr = splash_scr;
    splash_scr = NULL;
    space_invaders_create();
    lv_obj_del(old_scr);
}

void splash_screen_create(void)
{
    splash_scr = lv_obj_create(NULL);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(splash_scr, lv_color_make(0x00, 0x10, 0x30), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(splash_scr, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(splash_scr, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);

    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(splash_scr);

    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, lv_color_white(), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_16, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_align(title, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, -60);

    /* Breakout button */
    lv_obj_t *btn1 = lv_btn_create(splash_scr);
    lv_obj_set_size(btn1, 160, 40);
    lv_obj_align(btn1, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, -10);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn1, lv_color_make(0x00, 0x60, 0xA0), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn1, breakout_btn_cb, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);

    lv_obj_t *lbl1 = lv_label_create(btn1);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl1, "Breakout");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl1, &lv_font_montserrat_14, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_center(lbl1);

    /* Space Invaders button */
    lv_obj_t *btn2 = lv_btn_create(splash_scr);
    lv_obj_set_size(btn2, 160, 40);
    lv_obj_align(btn2, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 40);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn2, lv_color_make(0x00, 0x60, 0xA0), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn2, invaders_btn_cb, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);

    lv_obj_t *lbl2 = lv_label_create(btn2);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl2, "Space Invaders");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl2, &lv_font_montserrat_14, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_center(lbl2);

    lv_scr_load(splash_scr);
}

```c
#include "touch_report.h"
#include "splash_screen.h"
#include "game_common.h"
#include "../app.h"
#include "../../../../third_party/lvgl/src/lvgl.h"

#define TR_CROSSHAIR_SIZE   20
#define TR_LINE_THICKNESS   2
#define TR_DOT_SIZE         6
#define TR_UPDATE_MS        20

typedef struct {
    lv_obj_t *screen;
    lv_obj_t *coord_label;
    lv_obj_t *h_line;
    lv_obj_t *v_line;
    lv_obj_t *dot;
    lv_obj_t *back_label;
    lv_timer_t *timer;
} touch_report_state_t;

static touch_report_state_t g_tr;

static void tr_timer_cb(lv_timer_t *timer)
{
    touch_report_state_t *t = &g_tr;
    (void)timer;

    int16_t x = (int16_t)touchX;
    int16_t y = (int16_t)touchY;

    lv_label_set_text_fmt(t->coord_label, "X: %d  Y: %d  %s",
                          x, y, touchDown ? "DOWN" : "UP");

    if (touchDown) {
        lv_obj_set_pos(t->h_line, x - TR_CROSSHAIR_SIZE, y - TR_LINE_THICKNESS / 2);
        lv_obj_set_pos(t->v_line, x - TR_LINE_THICKNESS / 2, y - TR_CROSSHAIR_SIZE);
        lv_obj_set_pos(t->dot, x - TR_DOT_SIZE / 2, y - TR_DOT_SIZE / 2);
        lv_obj_clear_flag(t->h_line, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
        lv_obj_clear_flag(t->v_line, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
        lv_obj_clear_flag(t->dot, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
    } else {
        lv_obj_add_flag(t->h_line, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
        lv_obj_add_flag(t->v_line, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
        lv_obj_add_flag(t->dot, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
    }
}

static void back_btn_cb(lv_event_t *e)
{
    (void)e;
    touch_report_destroy();
    splash_screen_create();
}

void touch_report_create(void)
{
    touch_report_state_t *t = &g_tr;

    t->screen = lv_obj_create(NULL);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(t->screen, lv_color_black(), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(t->screen, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(t->screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);

    /* Coordinate readout at top center */
    t->coord_label = lv_label_create(t->screen);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(t->coord_label, lv_color_white(), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(t->coord_label, &lv_font_montserrat_14, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_align(t->coord_label, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 5);
    lv_label_set_text(t->coord_label, "X: 0  Y: 0  UP");

    /* Back button (top-left) */
    lv_obj_t *back_btn = lv_btn_create(t->screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(back_btn, 60, 28);
    lv_obj_set_pos(back_btn, 5, 5);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(back_btn, lv_color_make(0x40, 0x40, 0x40), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(back_btn, back_btn_cb, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);

    t->back_label = lv_label_create(back_btn);
    lv_label_set_text(t->back_label, "Back");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(t->back_label, &lv_font_montserrat_12, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_center(t->back_label);

    /* Crosshair horizontal line */
    t->h_line = lv_obj_create(t->screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(t->h_line, TR_CROSSHAIR_SIZE * 2, TR_LINE_THICKNESS);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(t->h_line, lv_color_make(0x00, 0xFF, 0x00), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(t->h_line, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(t->h_line, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(t->h_line, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(t->h_line, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
    lv_obj_add_flag(t->h_line, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);

    /* Crosshair vertical line */
    t->v_line = lv_obj_create(t->screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(t->v_line, TR_LINE_THICKNESS, TR_CROSSHAIR_SIZE * 2);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(t->v_line, lv_color_make(0x00, 0xFF, 0x00), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(t->v_line, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(t->v_line, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(t->v_line, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(t->v_line, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
    lv_obj_add_flag(t->v_line, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);

    /* Center dot */
    t->dot = lv_obj_create(t->screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(t->dot, TR_DOT_SIZE, TR_DOT_SIZE);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(t->dot, lv_color_make(0xFF, 0xFF, 0x00), LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(t->dot, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(t->dot, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(t->dot, TR_DOT_SIZE / 2, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(t->dot, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
    lv_obj_add_flag(t->dot, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);

    /* Update timer */
    t->timer = lv_timer_create(tr_timer_cb, TR_UPDATE_MS, NULL);

    lv_scr_load(t->screen);
}

void touch_report_destroy(void)
{
    touch_report_state_t *t = &g_tr;

    if (t->timer) {
        lv_timer_del(t->timer);
        t->timer = NULL;
    }

    if (t->screen) {
        lv_obj_del(t->screen);
        t->screen = NULL;
    }
}

```

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-06-28 06:20:30Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is asking about creating a "Paratrooper" game - the classic arcade game where you control an anti-aircraft gun and shoot paratroopers descending from helicopters. Let me think about whether this is feasible on the SAME51 with LVGL and the constraints we have.

Key constraints:
- 480x320 display, 16-bit color
- 48KB LVGL heap
- Integer-only physics preferred
- Pre-allocated LVGL objects (hide/show)
- Touch input (touchX, touchY, touchDown)
- 20ms game loop (50Hz)
The core gameplay involves a rotating gun turret at the bottom that fires at helicopters flying across the top and paratroopers descending with parachutes. The main challenge is that LVGL 8.2 doesn't support object rotation natively, so I'd need to simulate the gun's rotation using line segments or a dynamic line that changes angle based on aim direction. Paratroopers landing on the ground would accumulate, and reaching a threshold triggers game over.

For the visual elements, I can represent paratroopers as simple colored rectangles and use basic shapes for the helicopters. The trickier part is calculating bullet trajectories—I need to use trigonometry to determine the bullet's direction based on where the gun is aimed, but since the project avoids floating-point math in the game loop, I'd use a lookup table or fixed-point approximations for sine and cosine values. The object count would be manageable with just a few helicopters on screen at once and a reasonable cap on paratroopers before the game ends.

The core gameplay loop is straightforward: the gun sits at the bottom-center, the player taps anywhere on screen to fire a bullet toward that point, helicopters move horizontally and drop paratroopers periodically, and paratroopers descend slowly before walking toward the gun if they land. Hitting helicopters gives more points than hitting paratroopers, and the game ends if four paratroopers reach the gun.

For the bullet direction calculation, I can compute the vector from the gun to the tap point, then normalize it using integer math—either with a fast integer square root or by scaling based on the larger component. Since the M4F has an FPU, I could even use a small amount of floating-point just for the initial velocity calculation when firing, then store the bullet velocity as fixed-point integers. This approach is definitely workable.
</details></think>

57	 * @param obj           pointer to a line object

59	 * @param point_num     number of points in 'point_a'
60	 */
61	void lv_line_set_points(lv_obj_t * obj, const lv_point_t points[], uint16_t point_num);

24	/**********************
25	 *      TYPEDEFS
26	 **********************/
27	
28	/**********************
29	 *  STATIC PROTOTYPES
30	 **********************/
31	static void lv_line_constructor(const lv_obj_class_t * class_p, lv_obj_t * obj);
32	static void lv_line_event(const lv_obj_class_t * class_p, lv_event_t * e);
33	
34	/**********************
35	 *  STATIC VARIABLES
36	 **********************/
37	const lv_obj_class_t lv_line_class = {
38	    .constructor_cb = lv_line_constructor,
39	    .event_cb = lv_line_event,
40	    .width_def = LV_SIZE_CONTENT,
41	    .height_def = LV_SIZE_CONTENT,
42	    .instance_size = sizeof(lv_line_t),
43	    .base_class = &lv_obj_class
44	};
45	
46	/**********************
47	 *      MACROS
48	 **********************/
49	
50	/**********************
51	 *   GLOBAL FUNCTIONS
52	 **********************/
53	
54	lv_obj_t * lv_line_create(lv_obj_t * parent)
55	{
56	    LV_LOG_INFO("begin");
57	    lv_obj_t * obj = lv_obj_class_create_obj(MY_CLASS, parent);
58	    lv_obj_class_init_obj(obj);
59	    return obj;
60	}
61	
62	/*=====================
63	 * Setter functions
64	 *====================*/
65	
66	void lv_line_set_points(lv_obj_t * obj, const lv_point_t points[], uint16_t point_num)
67	{
68	    LV_ASSERT_OBJ(obj, MY_CLASS);
69	
70	    lv_line_t * line = (lv_line_t *)obj;
71	    line->point_array    = points;
72	    line->point_num      = point_num;
73	
74	    lv_obj_refresh_self_size(obj);
75	
76	    lv_obj_invalidate(obj);
77	}
78	
79	void lv_line_set_y_invert(lv_obj_t * obj, bool en)
80	{
81	    LV_ASSERT_OBJ(obj, MY_CLASS);
82	
83	    lv_line_t * line = (lv_line_t *)obj;
84	    if(line->y_inv == en) return;
85	
86	    line->y_inv = en == false ? 0 : 1;
87	
88	    lv_obj_invalidate(obj);
89	}
90	
91	/*=====================
92	 * Getter functions
93	 *====================*/
94	
95	bool lv_line_get_y_invert(const lv_obj_t * obj)
96	{
97	    LV_ASSERT_OBJ(obj, MY_CLASS);
98	
99	    lv_line_t * line = (lv_line_t *)obj;
100	
101	    return line->y_inv == 0 ? false : true;
102	}
103	
104	/**********************
105	 *   STATIC FUNCTIONS
106	 **********************/
107	
108	static void lv_line_constructor(const lv_obj_class_t * class_p, lv_obj_t * obj)
109	{
110	    LV_UNUSED(class_p);
111	    LV_TRACE_OBJ_CREATE("begin");
112	
113	    lv_line_t * line = (lv_line_t *)obj;
114	
115	    line->point_num   = 0;
116	    line->point_array = NULL;
117	    line->y_inv       = 0;
118	
119	    lv_obj_clear_flag(obj, LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
120	
121	    LV_TRACE_OBJ_CREATE("finished");
122	}
123	
124	static void lv_line_event(const lv_obj_class_t * class_p, lv_event_t * e)
125	{
126	    LV_UNUSED(class_p);
127	
128	    lv_res_t res;
129	
130	    /*Call the ancestor's event handler*/
131	    res = lv_obj_event_base(MY_CLASS, e);
132	    if(res != LV_RES_OK) return;
133	
134	    lv_event_code_t code = lv_event_get_code(e);
135	    lv_obj_t * obj = lv_event_get_target(e);
136	
137	    if(code == LV_EVENT_REFR_EXT_DRAW_SIZE) {
138	        /*The corner of the skew lines is out of the intended area*/
139	        lv_coord_t line_width = lv_obj_get_style_line_width(obj, LV_PART_MAIN);
140	        lv_coord_t * s = lv_event_get_param(e);
141	        if(*s < line_width) *s = line_width;
142	    }
143	    else if(code == LV_EVENT_GET_SELF_SIZE) {
144	        lv_line_t * line = (lv_line_t *)obj;
145	
146	        lv_point_t * p = lv_event_get_param(e);
147	        lv_coord_t w = 0;
148	        lv_coord_t h = 0;
149	        if(line->point_num > 0) {
150	            uint16_t i;
151	            for(i = 0; i < line->point_num; i++) {
152	                w = LV_MAX(line->point_array[i].x, w);
153	                h = LV_MAX(line->point_array[i].y, h);
154	            }
155	
156	            lv_coord_t line_width = lv_obj_get_style_line_width(obj, LV_PART_MAIN);
157	            w += line_width;
158	            h += line_width;
159	            p->x = w;
160	            p->y = h;
161	        }
162	    }
163	    else if(code == LV_EVENT_DRAW_MAIN) {
164	        lv_line_t * line = (lv_line_t *)obj;
165	        lv_draw_ctx_t * draw_ctx = lv_event_get_draw_ctx(e);
166	
167	        if(line->point_num == 0 || line->point_array == NULL) return;
168	
169	        lv_area_t area;
170	        lv_obj_get_coords(obj, &area);
171	        lv_coord_t x_ofs = area.x1 - lv_obj_get_scroll_x(obj);
172	        lv_coord_t y_ofs = area.y1 - lv_obj_get_scroll_y(obj);
173	        lv_point_t p1;
174	        lv_point_t p2;
175	        lv_coord_t h = lv_obj_get_height(obj);
176	        uint16_t i;
177	
178	        lv_draw_line_dsc_t line_dsc;
179	        lv_draw_line_dsc_init(&line_dsc);
180	        lv_obj_init_draw_line_dsc(obj, LV_PART_MAIN, &line_dsc);
181	
182	        /*Read all points and draw the lines*/
183	        for(i = 0; i < line->point_num - 1; i++) {
184	
185	            p1.x = line->point_array[i].x + x_ofs;
186	            p2.x = line->point_array[i + 1].x + x_ofs;
187	
188	            if(line->y_inv == 0) {
189	                p1.y = line->point_array[i].y + y_ofs;
190	                p2.y = line->point_array[i + 1].y + y_ofs;
191	            }
192	            else {
193	                p1.y = h - line->point_array[i].y + y_ofs;
194	                p2.y = h - line->point_array[i + 1].y + y_ofs;
195	            }
196	            lv_draw_line(draw_ctx, &line_dsc, &p1, &p2);
197	            line_dsc.round_start = 0;   /*Draw the rounding only on the end points after the first line*/
198	        }
199	    }
200	}
201	#endif
202
```

121	static void si_recalc_speed(space_invaders_state_t *g)
122	{
123	    int16_t killed = SI_ALIEN_COUNT - g->aliens_alive;
124	    g->move_interval = SI_BASE_MOVE_TICKS - killed;
125	    if (g->move_interval < SI_MIN_MOVE_TICKS) g->move_interval = SI_MIN_MOVE_TICKS;
126	
127	    g->fire_interval = SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_TICKS - killed / 2;
128	    if (g->fire_interval < SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_MIN) g->fire_interval = SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_MIN;
129	}

131	static void si_find_grid_bounds(space_invaders_state_t *g, int16_t *left_col, int16_t *right_col)
132	{
133	    *left_col = SI_ALIEN_COLS;
134	    *right_col = -1;
135	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_ALIEN_COUNT; i++) {
136	        if (!g->alien_alive[i]) continue;
137	        int col = i % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
138	        if (col < *left_col) *left_col = col;
139	        if (col > *right_col) *right_col = col;
140	    }
141	}
142	
143	static void si_update_ship(space_invaders_state_t *g)
144	{
145	    if (touchDown) {
146	        int16_t target_x = (int16_t)touchX - SI_SHIP_WIDTH / 2;
147	        if (target_x < 0) target_x = 0;
148	        if (target_x > SCREEN_WIDTH - SI_SHIP_WIDTH) target_x = SCREEN_WIDTH - SI_SHIP_WIDTH;
149	        g->ship_x = target_x;
150	    }
151	}
152	
153	static void si_update_player_bullet(space_invaders_state_t *g)
154	{
155	    if (!g->pbullet_active) return;
156	    g->pbullet_y -= SI_PLAYER_BULLET_SPEED;
157	    if (g->pbullet_y + SI_BULLET_HEIGHT < 0) {
158	        g->pbullet_active = false;
159	        lv_obj_add_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
160	    }
161	}
162	
163	static void si_update_alien_bullets(space_invaders_state_t *g)
164	{
165	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
166	        if (!g->abullet_active[i]) continue;
167	        g->abullet_y[i] += SI_ALIEN_BULLET_SPEED;
168	        if (g->abullet_y[i] > SCREEN_HEIGHT) {
169	            g->abullet_active[i] = false;
170	            lv_obj_add_flag(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
171	        }
172	    }
173	}
174	
175	static void si_move_aliens(space_invaders_state_t *g)
176	{
177	    int16_t left_col, right_col;
178	    si_find_grid_bounds(g, &left_col, &right_col);
179	
180	    if (right_col < 0) return;
181	
182	    int16_t left_edge = g->grid_x + left_col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H);
183	    int16_t right_edge = g->grid_x + right_col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H) + SI_ALIEN_WIDTH;
184	
185	    bool hit_edge = false;
186	    if (g->grid_dir > 0 && right_edge + SI_ALIEN_STEP_X > SCREEN_WIDTH) {
187	        hit_edge = true;
188	    } else if (g->grid_dir < 0 && left_edge - SI_ALIEN_STEP_X < 0) {
189	        hit_edge = true;
190	    }
191	
192	    if (hit_edge) {
193	        g->grid_dir = -g->grid_dir;
194	        g->grid_y += SI_ALIEN_DROP_Y;
195	    } else {
196	        g->grid_x += g->grid_dir * SI_ALIEN_STEP_X;
197	    }
198	}
199	
200	static void si_alien_fire(space_invaders_state_t *g)
201	{
202	    int slot = -1;
203	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
204	        if (!g->abullet_active[i]) { slot = i; break; }
205	    }
206	    if (slot < 0) return;
207	
208	    int attempts = 0;
209	    while (attempts < SI_ALIEN_COLS * 2) {
210	        int col = si_rand(g) % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
211	        int bottom_alien = -1;
212	        for (int row = SI_ALIEN_ROWS - 1; row >= 0; row--) {
213	            int idx = row * SI_ALIEN_COLS + col;
214	            if (g->alien_alive[idx]) { bottom_alien = idx; break; }
215	        }
216	        if (bottom_alien >= 0) {
217	            int ac = bottom_alien % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
218	            int ar = bottom_alien / SI_ALIEN_COLS;
219	            g->abullet_x[slot] = g->grid_x + ac * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H) + SI_ALIEN_WIDTH / 2 - SI_BULLET_WIDTH / 2;
220	            g->abullet_y[slot] = g->grid_y + ar * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V) + SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT;
221	            g->abullet_active[slot] = true;
222	            lv_obj_clear_flag(g->alien_bullets[slot], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
223	            return;
224	        }
225	        attempts++;
226	    }
227	}
228	
229	static void si_check_player_bullet_hits(space_invaders_state_t *g)
230	{
231	    if (!g->pbullet_active) return;
232	
233	    int16_t bx1 = g->pbullet_x;
234	    int16_t by1 = g->pbullet_y;
235	    int16_t bx2 = bx1 + SI_BULLET_WIDTH;
236	    int16_t by2 = by1 + SI_BULLET_HEIGHT;
237	
238	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_ALIEN_COUNT; i++) {
239	        if (!g->alien_alive[i]) continue;
240	
241	        int col = i % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
242	        int row = i / SI_ALIEN_COLS;
243	        int16_t ax = g->grid_x + col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H);
244	        int16_t ay = g->grid_y + row * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V);
245	
246	        if (bx2 >= ax && bx1 <= ax + SI_ALIEN_WIDTH &&
247	            by2 >= ay && by1 <= ay + SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT) {
248	            g->alien_alive[i] = false;
249	            lv_obj_add_flag(g->aliens[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
250	            g->aliens_alive--;
251	            g->score += si_row_scores[row];
252	            si_update_score_display(g);
253	            si_recalc_speed(g);
254	
255	            g->pbullet_active = false;
256	            lv_obj_add_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
257	
258	            if (g->aliens_alive == 0) {
259	                g->state = GAME_STATE_WIN;
260	                si_show_message(g, "YOU WIN!\nTap to continue");
261	            }
262	            return;
263	        }
264	    }
265	}
266	
267	static void si_check_alien_bullet_hits(space_invaders_state_t *g)
268	{
269	    int16_t sx1 = g->ship_x;
270	    int16_t sy1 = SI_SHIP_Y;
271	    int16_t sx2 = sx1 + SI_SHIP_WIDTH;
272	    int16_t sy2 = sy1 + SI_SHIP_HEIGHT;
273	
274	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
275	        if (!g->abullet_active[i]) continue;
276	
277	        int16_t bx1 = g->abullet_x[i];
278	        int16_t by1 = g->abullet_y[i];
279	        int16_t bx2 = bx1 + SI_BULLET_WIDTH;
280	        int16_t by2 = by1 + SI_BULLET_HEIGHT;
281	
282	        if (bx2 >= sx1 && bx1 <= sx2 && by2 >= sy1 && by1 <= sy2) {
283	            g->abullet_active[i] = false;
284	            lv_obj_add_flag(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
285	            g->lives--;
286	            si_update_lives_display(g);
287	            if (g->lives == 0) {
288	                g->state = GAME_STATE_GAME_OVER;
289	                si_show_message(g, "GAME OVER\nTap to continue");
290	            }
291	            return;
292	        }
293	    }
294	}
295	
296	static void si_check_invasion(space_invaders_state_t *g)
297	{
298	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_ALIEN_COUNT; i++) {
299	        if (!g->alien_alive[i]) continue;
300	        int row = i / SI_ALIEN_COLS;
301	        int16_t ay = g->grid_y + row * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V) + SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT;
302	        if (ay >= SI_INVASION_Y) {
303	            g->state = GAME_STATE_GAME_OVER;
304	            si_show_message(g, "INVADED!\nTap to continue");

308	}

310	static void si_update_positions(space_invaders_state_t *g)

312	    lv_obj_set_pos(g->ship, g->ship_x, SI_SHIP_Y);
313	
314	    if (g->pbullet_active) {

316	    }
317	
318	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
319	        if (g->abullet_active[i]) {
320	            lv_obj_set_pos(g->alien_bullets[i], g->abullet_x[i], g->abullet_y[i]);
321	        }
322	    }
323	
324	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_ALIEN_COUNT; i++) {
325	        if (!g->alien_alive[i]) continue;
326	        int col = i % SI_ALIEN_COLS;
327	        int row = i / SI_ALIEN_COLS;
328	        int16_t ax = g->grid_x + col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H);
329	        int16_t ay = g->grid_y + row * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V);
330	        lv_obj_set_pos(g->aliens[i], ax, ay);

333	
334	static void si_game_timer_cb(lv_timer_t *timer)
335	{
336	    space_invaders_state_t *g = &g_si;
337	    (void)timer;
338	
339	    if (g->state != GAME_STATE_PLAYING) return;
340	
341	    si_update_ship(g);
342	    si_update_player_bullet(g);
343	    si_update_alien_bullets(g);
344	
345	    g->move_tick_counter++;
346	    if (g->move_tick_counter >= g->move_interval) {
347	        g->move_tick_counter = 0;
348	        si_move_aliens(g);
349	    }
350	
351	    g->fire_tick_counter++;
352	    if (g->fire_tick_counter >= g->fire_interval) {
353	        g->fire_tick_counter = 0;
354	        si_alien_fire(g);
355	    }
356	
357	    si_check_player_bullet_hits(g);
358	    if (g->state != GAME_STATE_PLAYING) return;
359	    si_check_alien_bullet_hits(g);
360	    if (g->state != GAME_STATE_PLAYING) return;
361	    si_check_invasion(g);
362	
363	    si_update_positions(g);
364	}
365	
366	static void si_screen_click_cb(lv_event_t *e)
367	{
368	    space_invaders_state_t *g = &g_si;
369	    (void)e;
370	
371	    switch (g->state) {
372	        case GAME_STATE_IDLE:
373	            g->state = GAME_STATE_PLAYING;
374	            si_hide_message(g);
375	            break;
376	        case GAME_STATE_PLAYING:
377	            if (!g->pbullet_active) {
378	                g->pbullet_x = g->ship_x + SI_SHIP_WIDTH / 2 - SI_BULLET_WIDTH / 2;
379	                g->pbullet_y = SI_SHIP_Y - SI_BULLET_HEIGHT;
380	                g->pbullet_active = true;
381	                lv_obj_clear_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
382	            }
383	            break;
384	        case GAME_STATE_GAME_OVER:
385	        case GAME_STATE_WIN:
386	            space_invaders_destroy();
387	            splash_screen_create();
388	            break;
389	    }
390	}
391	
392	static void si_create_aliens(space_invaders_state_t *g)
393	{
394	    for (int row = 0; row < SI_ALIEN_ROWS; row++) {
395	        for (int col = 0; col < SI_ALIEN_COLS; col++) {
396	            int idx = row * SI_ALIEN_COLS + col;
397	            int16_t x = g->grid_x + col * (SI_ALIEN_WIDTH + SI_ALIEN_GAP_H);
398	            int16_t y = g->grid_y + row * (SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT + SI_ALIEN_GAP_V);
399	
400	            g->aliens[idx] = lv_obj_create(g->screen);
401	            lv_obj_set_size(g->aliens[idx], SI_ALIEN_WIDTH, SI_ALIEN_HEIGHT);
402	            lv_obj_set_pos(g->aliens[idx], x, y);
403	            lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->aliens[idx], si_alien_colors[row], LV_PART_MAIN);
404	            lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->aliens[idx], LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
405	            lv_obj_set_style_radius(g->aliens[idx], 3, LV_PART_MAIN);
406	            lv_obj_set_style_border_width(g->aliens[idx], 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
407	            lv_obj_clear_flag(g->aliens[idx], LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
408	
409	            g->alien_alive[idx] = true;
410	        }
411	    }
412	    g->aliens_alive = SI_ALIEN_COUNT;
413	}
414	
415	void space_invaders_create(void)
416	{
417	    space_invaders_state_t *g = &g_si;
418	
419	    si_init_colors();
420	
421	    g->screen = lv_obj_create(NULL);
422	    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->screen, lv_color_make(0x00, 0x08, 0x18), LV_PART_MAIN);
423	    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->screen, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
424	    lv_obj_clear_flag(g->screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
425	    lv_obj_add_flag(g->screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
426	    lv_obj_add_event_cb(g->screen, si_screen_click_cb, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
427	
428	    g->grid_x = SI_ALIEN_MARGIN_LEFT;
429	    g->grid_y = SI_ALIEN_MARGIN_TOP;
430	    g->grid_dir = 1;
431	    g->move_tick_counter = 0;
432	    g->move_interval = SI_BASE_MOVE_TICKS;
433	    g->fire_tick_counter = 0;
434	    g->fire_interval = SI_FIRE_INTERVAL_TICKS;
435	    g->rng_state = 0xACE1;
436	
437	    si_create_aliens(g);
438	
439	    /* Ship */
440	    g->ship_x = (SCREEN_WIDTH - SI_SHIP_WIDTH) / 2;
441	    g->ship = lv_obj_create(g->screen);
442	    lv_obj_set_size(g->ship, SI_SHIP_WIDTH, SI_SHIP_HEIGHT);
443	    lv_obj_set_pos(g->ship, g->ship_x, SI_SHIP_Y);
444	    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->ship, lv_color_white(), LV_PART_MAIN);
445	    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->ship, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
446	    lv_obj_set_style_radius(g->ship, 4, LV_PART_MAIN);
447	    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(g->ship, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
448	    lv_obj_clear_flag(g->ship, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
449	
450	    /* Player bullet */
451	    g->player_bullet = lv_obj_create(g->screen);
452	    lv_obj_set_size(g->player_bullet, SI_BULLET_WIDTH, SI_BULLET_HEIGHT);
453	    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->player_bullet, lv_color_make(0xC0, 0xFF, 0x00), LV_PART_MAIN);
454	    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->player_bullet, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
455	    lv_obj_set_style_radius(g->player_bullet, 1, LV_PART_MAIN);
456	    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(g->player_bullet, 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
457	    lv_obj_clear_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
458	    lv_obj_add_flag(g->player_bullet, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
459	    g->pbullet_active = false;
460	
461	    /* Alien bullets */
462	    for (int i = 0; i < SI_MAX_ALIEN_BULLETS; i++) {
463	        g->alien_bullets[i] = lv_obj_create(g->screen);
464	        lv_obj_set_size(g->alien_bullets[i], SI_BULLET_WIDTH, SI_BULLET_HEIGHT);
465	        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(g->alien_bullets[i], lv_color_make(0xFF, 0x40, 0x40), LV_PART_MAIN);
466	        lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
467	        lv_obj_set_style_radius(g->alien_bullets[i], 1, LV_PART_MAIN);
468	        lv_obj_set_style_border_width(g->alien_bullets[i], 0, LV_PART_MAIN);
469	        lv_obj_clear_flag(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
470	        lv_obj_add_flag(g->alien_bullets[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
471	        g->abullet_active[i] = false;
472	    }
473	
474	    /* Score label */
475	    g->score_label = lv_label_create(g->screen);
476	    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(g->score_label, lv_color_white(), LV_PART_MAIN);
477	    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(g->score_label, &lv_font_montserrat_12, LV_PART_MAIN);
478	    lv_obj_set_pos(g->score_label, 5, 5);
479	    g->score = 0;
480	    si_update_score_display(g);
481	
482	    /* Lives label */
483	    g->lives_label = lv_label_create(g->screen);
484	    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(g->lives_label, lv_color_white(), LV_PART_MAIN);
485	    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(g->lives_label, &lv_font_montserrat_12, LV_PART_MAIN);
486	    lv_obj_align(g->lives_label, LV_ALIGN_TOP_RIGHT, -5, 5);
487	    g->lives = MAX_LIVES;
488	    si_update_lives_display(g);
489	
490	    /* Message label */
491	    g->message_label = lv_label_create(g->screen);
492	    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(g->message_label, lv_color_make(0xFF, 0xFF, 0x00), LV_PART_MAIN);
493	    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(g->message_label, &lv_font_montserrat_16, LV_PART_MAIN);
494	    lv_obj_set_style_text_align(g->message_label, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_PART_MAIN);
495	    lv_obj_align(g->message_label, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 40);
496	
497	    /* Initial state */
498	    g->state = GAME_STATE_IDLE;
499	    si_show_message(g, "Tap to start");
500	
501	    /* Game loop timer */
502	    g->game_timer = lv_timer_create(si_game_timer_cb, GAME_TIMER_MS, NULL);
503	
504	    lv_scr_load(g->screen);
505	}
506	
507	void space_invaders_destroy(void)
508	{
509	    space_invaders_state_t *g = &g_si;
510	
511	    if (g->game_timer) {
512	        lv_timer_del(g->game_timer);
513	        g->game_timer = NULL;
514	    }
515	
516	    if (g->screen) {
517	        lv_obj_del(g->screen);
518	        g->screen = NULL;
519	    }
520	}
